text:
nas2# getfacl .
#file:.
#owner:0
#group:10001
user::rwx
user:an-gulina:rwx

group:migration_accoun:rwx

other::---

=======================
real full group name (in 9 line) - 'migration_accounting'
this group - not local, but from Windows 2003 Domain controller, through
winbindd

How-To-Repeat: always, on all group with long names
